nasb.text: (now the man’s name was Nabal, and his wife’s name was Abigail. And the woman was intelligent and beautiful in appearance, but the man was harsh and evil in his dealings, and he was a Calebite),

esv.text: Now the name of the man was Nabal, and the name of his wife Abigail. The woman was discerning and beautiful, but the man was harsh and badly behaved; he was a Calebite.

cnv.text: 那人名叫拿八，他的妻子名叫亞比該。這女人既聰明，又美麗。但那男人為人粗暴，又行事兇惡。他是個迦勒族的人。

ccb.text: 他名叫拿八，是迦勒族人，妻子名叫亚比该，既聪慧又漂亮。拿八粗暴凶恶。
